messages.emptyHint: Send text, images, audio or files to get started.
messages.confirmRegenerate: Regenerate the last response? The current response will be deleted.
modelSelector.title: Model Selector
modelSelector.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred while loading the model.
modelSelector.e2b.capabilities: Ideal for simple and quick tasks
modelSelector.e4b.capabilities: Good balance of speed and quality
modelSelector.e4b.limitations: May require more VRAM than simpler models
modelSelector.26b.capabilities: Ideal for advanced analysis and long documents
settings.title: Settings
settings.enterToSendHelp: When enabled, Enter sends the message and Shift+Enter adds a line break.
settings.storagePrivacy: This application does not send your data to any external server. All conversations and files remain stored locally on your computer.
settings.voiceWarning: WARNING: when using the voice playback feature (listen to response button), the generated message will be sent to Microsoft online services for speech synthesis, depending on the selected voice and your browser/OS configuration.
settings.deleteAllHelp: This removes all conversations and also deletes files saved in conversations.
settings.customInstructionsHelp: Tell the model how you'd like it to respond. These instructions are included in every conversation.
settings.customInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g.: Always answer in Portuguese. Be concise and direct.
settings.customInstructionsWarning:
By enabling custom instructions, you take full responsibility for the content provided to the model. Custom instructions may cause the model to generate responses that are:

• Inaccurate or factually incorrect
• Inappropriate or offensive
• Potentially dangerous or harmful
• Potentially illegal or in violation of terms of use

The system does not filter or moderate responses when custom instructions are active.

Do you want to enable custom instructions?
settings.customInstructionsDisabledNote: Enable the toggle above for custom instructions to be applied to conversations.
chat.customInstructionsDisclaimer: WARNING: custom instructions enabled, use at your own risk
chat.customInstructionsDisclaimerFull: Custom instructions are active. The model may generate inaccurate, inappropriate, dangerous, potentially harmful or illegal responses. You are solely responsible for the generated content. The system does not filter or moderate responses when this feature is active.
settings.webAccessHelp: When enabled, the model can fetch content from public web pages to answer questions with up-to-date information.
settings.webAccessToggle: Allow model to access the web
settings.webAccessWarning:
Enabling web access allows the model to browse web pages during conversations. This means:

• Content from external pages will be downloaded to your computer
• Your IP address will be visible to the accessed websites

⚠ WARNING: Although no conversation data is intentionally sent by the program, the model may use information from the conversation context to formulate queries and URLs, which could result in external exposure of private or sensitive data present in your messages.

Do you want to enable web access?
settings.webAccessActive: Web access is active. The model can fetch content from public web pages.
settings.localFilesHelp: When enabled, the model can list and read files in folders you specify. Read-only access — no files will be modified.
settings.localFilesToggle: Allow model to read local files
settings.localFilesWarning:
Enabling local file access allows the model to read files on your computer within folders you specify. This means:

• The model can see file names, sizes, and contents
• File contents will be sent to the local model for processing
• Only READ access is granted — no files will be created, modified, or deleted

You will need to specify which folders the model can access.

Do you want to enable local file access?
settings.localFilesActive: Local file access is active. The model can read files in the allowed folders.
settings.localFilesNoFolders: No folders configured. Add folders below to allow the model to read files.
settings.locationSharingHelp: When enabled, your approximate location (city-level) is shared with the model to provide location-aware responses such as weather, local time, or nearby places.
settings.locationSharingToggle: Share my location with the model
legal.gate.subtitle: Please review and accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Notice to continue.
legal.gate.accept: I have read and accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Notice
legal.terms: By using My AI Playground ("the Application"), you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the Application.

My AI Playground is an open-source, desktop-local application that enables conversations with Google Gemma AI models running entirely on your machine. It provides a web-based interface for text, image, audio, and file interactions, with all inference performed locally using llama.cpp.

All AI inference is performed locally on your hardware. You are solely responsible for the content you input (including text, images, audio, and files), as well as for the use you make of any output generated by the models. You agree to use the Application lawfully and in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

Responses generated by AI models may contain errors, inaccuracies, biases, fabricated information ("hallucinations"), or inappropriate content. The Application does not filter, moderate, or guarantee the accuracy of model outputs. You must independently verify any information before relying on it for decisions or actions.

The Application is not designed to provide, and must not be relied upon for, professional, medical, legal, financial, psychological, or safety-critical advice. Model outputs do not constitute professional opinions of any kind.
The Application incorporates third-party open-source components, each governed by its own license:
Please consult each project's repository for the full license text and terms.

The AI models used by this Application (Google Gemma family) are not distributed with the Application. They are downloaded directly from Hugging Face at your request and are subject to Google's Gemma Terms of Use (https://ai.google.dev/gemma/terms). By downloading and using these models, you agree to comply with those terms, which include restrictions on generating harmful, illegal, or deceptive content.
The Application's source code is licensed under the Apache License 2.0. This license does not grant rights to trademarks, trade names, or service marks of the author or any third party.

THE APPLICATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE," WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT. THE AUTHOR DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE APPLICATION WILL BE ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR UNINTERRUPTED.

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, THE AUTHOR SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APPLICATION, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO DAMAGES FROM RELIANCE ON AI-GENERATED CONTENT, DATA LOSS, OR SYSTEM FAILURES.

These Terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the Application after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. You will be asked to review and accept the revised Terms when they are updated.
This Application was created by Rodolfo Motta Saraiva as a personal open-source project. For questions or issues, visit the project repository on GitHub.
legal.privacy: 1. Overview
My AI Playground is designed with local-first privacy. This notice explains what data the Application handles, where it is stored, and when external network connections may occur.
2. Data Stored Locally
• Conversations (text messages) are stored in a local SQLite database at data/app.db.
• Files you attach to conversations (images, audio, documents) are saved locally in data/uploads/.
• Application preferences (language, voice, UI settings) are stored in your browser's localStorage.
• Legal acceptance records (date, time, and a hash of the accepted terms) are stored in data/legal-acceptance.json.
All of this data resides exclusively on your computer and is never transmitted to external servers by the Application.
3. External Network Connections
The Application may connect to external services in the following situations:

• Model downloads: When you load a model for the first time, the GGUF files are downloaded from Hugging Face (huggingface.co). This involves standard HTTPS requests and is subject to Hugging Face's privacy policy.
• Dependency installation: During initial setup, Python packages and Node.js modules are downloaded from PyPI, npm, and other package registries.
• llama-server binary: The installer downloads the llama.cpp server binary from GitHub releases.
After initial setup and model download, the Application operates fully offline during normal chat use.
4. Text-to-Speech

When you use the "listen to response" feature, the Application calls the browser's built-in speechSynthesis API. Depending on your browser, operating system, and the selected voice, the text may be processed locally or sent to Microsoft's online speech services. The Application does not control this behavior — it depends on your system configuration. If privacy is a concern, select a voice labeled as "local" or "offline" in your system settings.
5. No Analytics or Tracking
The Application does not include any analytics, telemetry, crash reporting, or tracking mechanisms. No usage data is collected or transmitted.
6. Data Retention and Deletion
You have full control over your data:
• Delete individual conversations via the sidebar context menu.
• Delete all conversations and files via the Settings panel ("Delete all" option).
• Manually delete the data/ folder to remove all local data.
No data is retained on external servers.
7. Children's Privacy
The Application is not directed at children under 13 years of age. If you are under 13, do not use the Application without parental supervision.
8. Changes to This Notice
This Privacy Notice may be updated when the Application is updated. You will be asked to review and accept the updated notice when changes are detected.
9. Contact
For questions about privacy, visit the project repository on GitHub or contact the author, Rodolfo Motta Saraiva, at https://rmsaraiva.com/.
